## Description

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Keep it brief. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link related issues: "Closes #123", "Fixes #456", "Related to #789" -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check the one that applies. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring, no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD pipeline changes

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe how you verified your changes. -->

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's conventions (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] I have written my code and comments in English
- [ ] All tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
